news.headline: MAG Silver reports Q3 production from Juanicipio in 2024, with a partnership split of 56% Fresnillo and 44% MAG.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 23, 2024, MAG Silver Corp. (TSX / NYSE American: MAG) shared updates on Juanicipio production for Q3 2024. The venture, with ownership split at 56% for Fresnillo plc and 44% for MAG, reported its figures for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop due to McDonald's E. coli outbreak, Arm-Qualcomm feud; Tesla earnings pending.
news.summary: Stock market futures experienced a decline due to McDonald's plummeting following an E. coli outbreak, while tensions rose in a dispute between Arm and Qualcomm. Additionally, investors are anticipating Tesla's upcoming earnings report. The Dow Jones futures market reflected these events as they unfolded, with significant attention on the mentioned companies.

news.headline: TELUS Digital ranked 'Leader' in CX Services for High Tech & Automotive by NelsonHall, reflects their CX Improvement Capability.
news.summary: TELUS Digital Experience, a company focused on creating lasting customer experiences through data, technology, and a customer-oriented approach, has achieved the title of ‘Leader’ for Customer Experience (CX) Improvement Capability in the NelsonHall NEAT Vendor Evaluation for CX Services in High Tech & Automotive. The designation places TELUS Digital at the top in this category, showcasing its proficiency in utilizing data-driven strategies. The company is listed on both NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol TIXT. Located in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company's comprehensive services have earned them recognition in the industry.

news.headline: OneSpaWorld to disclose third-quarter fiscal 2024 financial results on Oct.30, 2024 (Nasdaq: OSW) in NY. Conference call at 10 am ET.
news.summary: OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited, a global leader in health and wellness offerings for cruise ships and destination resorts, will be revealing its financial performance for the Third Quarter Fiscal 2024 on October 30th before the market opens. The company, listed as NASDAQ: OSW, will also host a conference call at 10:00 am ET on the same day to delve into the quarterly results. This event will provide insights into the company's progress and financial standing during this period.

news.headline: Avery Dennison reports strong Q3 2024 results with above expectation earnings growth driven by higher volume.
news.summary: In Mentor, Ohio, Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE: AVY) revealed their preliminary, unaudited results for the third quarter ending on September 28, 2024. The company reported impressive earnings growth exceeding expectations, bolstered by increased volume and productivity gains. Non-GAAP financial figures mentioned in the announcement can be found reconciled to GAAP in the accompanying financial schedules. All comparisons made are in reference to the corresponding period in the previous year.

news.headline: Amer Sports, Inc. will announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 19, 2024, with a webcast at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: Helsinki - Amer Sports, Inc. revealed plans to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 before the market opens on Tuesday, November 19, 2024. The global group, known for its distinguished sports and outdoor brands, will host a webcast with management at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. The webcast can be accessed on the Amer Sports - Investor Relations website. Additionally, a replay of the conference call will be made available shortly after the initial broadcast.

news.headline: Taylor Morrison reported Q3 2024 results: net income of $251 million ($2.37 per share), 9% increase in net sales orders to 2,830, and $2.0 billion in home closings revenue from 3,394 closings at an avg. price of $598,000. CEO Palmer expects to exceed yearly metrics with planned growth and strong performance. Share repurchases were $61 million, totaling $258 million year-to-date. Home closings expected to be 12,725 with a gross margin of around 24.3% for full year 2024. Total liquidity at quarter-end was $1.2 billion. Land acquisition and development spend totaled $593 million, up from $552 million a year ago. Learn more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Taylor Morrison Home Corporation reported a net income of $251 million in the third quarter of 2024, with earnings per diluted share at $2.37, representing a 54% increase in comparison to the prior year. Key highlights included a 9% increase in net sales orders to 2,830, $2.0 billion in home closings revenue from 3,394 closings at an average price of $598,000, and a home closings gross margin of 24.8%. The company owned and controlled 83,579 homebuilding lots, with a record 58% controlled off balance sheet. Share repurchases totaled $61 million during the quarter and $258 million year to date, with total liquidity at $1.2 billion and no senior debt maturities until 2027. Taylor Morrison's CEO Sheryl Palmer credited the diversified consumer and geographic strategy for delivering strong results, with expectations to exceed annual targets in 2024. The company expects its financial performance to remain strong in 2025, supported by growth and favorable market conditions.

news.headline: South Africa's inflation expected to continue declining.
Iteris (NASDAQ: ITI) stockholders approve merger with Almaviva. Almaviva to acquire Iteris in all-cash transaction.
news.summary: Austin, Texas-based company Iteris, Inc. (NASDAQ: ITI) has received approval from its stockholders for the merger agreement with Almaviva S.p.A. The announcement was made today by Iteris, a leading technology ecosystem for smart mobility infrastructure management. The merger agreement states that Almaviva will acquire Iteris in an all-cash transaction. The approval came during Iteris’ Special Meeting of Stockholders held yesterday. This merger marks a significant move for Iteris as it transitions to become a part of Almaviva.

news.headline: Global de-aromatic solvent market to reach US$4,116.1 million by 2034, growing at 6.2% CAGR. China and the US lead in demand.
news.summary: The global De-aromatic Solvents Market is estimated to reach a valuation of US$ 2,255.5 million in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 6.2% CAGR from 2024 to 2034. The increasing focus on environmental sustainability in the paint and coating industry is driving the demand for de-aromatic solvents worldwide, with China leading as the primary chemical manufacturer and consumer. The United States is also experiencing growth in the de-aromatized solvents market due to industry shifts towards sustainability. Despite challenges like raw material price volatilities, the market is expected to expand due to technological advancements and rising demand for eco-friendly alternatives. The market study reveals a significant opportunity of US$ 1,860.6 million from 2024 to 2034, with North America emerging as a prominent region in this market. The global demand for de-aromatic solvents is likely to increase as industries prioritize eco-friendly, safer chemical alternatives.

news.headline: $T AT&T Q3 2024 Earnings
Beazer Homes, Inc. to webcast Q4 & full year fiscal 2024 results on Nov 13, 2024; call at 5 PM ET. Public can listen online.
news.summary: Beazer Homes (NYSE: BZH) has announced the date for releasing its financial results for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024, which is set for Wednesday, November 13, 2024, after the market closes. A conference call will be held on the same day at 5:00 PM ET for management to discuss the outcomes. The public can access the call and view the Company's presentation slides on the "Investor Relations" section of Beazer Homes' official website, www.beazer.com.

news.headline: Multitude P.L.C. shareholder meeting approves final accounts, releases board members and CEO from liability.
news.summary: At the recent Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders, Multitude P.L.C. shareholders voted to approve the final accounts. The meeting also included a decision to discharge the members of the Board of Directors and the Chief Executive Officer from liability. The meeting saw a significant turnout, with over [number] shareholders casting their votes. This decision reflects the shareholders' confidence in the company's financial standings and leadership.

news.headline: Nova Minerals drills 29m @ 7.1 g/t Au at RPM in Alaska, part of a recent RC drilling program.
news.summary: An announcement was made by Nova Minerals Limited regarding the results of its recent drilling program in the RPM starter pit area of the Estelle Gold Project in Alaska. The program, consisting of 21 reverse circulation (RC) holes, revealed high-grade thick intercepts in the final six holes. The project covers over 500km2 in the Tintina Gold Belt. The drilling focused on mineralization at depths of less than 50m to support the ongoing Pre-Feasibility Study for the RPM starter mine. Nova traded on the NASDAQ as NVA, the ASX as NVA, and the FRA as QM3.

news.headline: Teleflex introduced new medical devices in Canada, Arrow™ VPS Rhythm™ DLX Device & NaviCurve™ Stylet, to improve PICC insertion, minimizing complications.
news.summary: In Wayne, Pennsylvania on October 23, 2024, Teleflex Incorporated unveiled two innovative devices in Canada aimed at improving PICC insertion procedures and minimizing complications. The newly introduced Arrow™ VPS Rhythm™ DLX Device and NaviCurve™ Stylet are specifically crafted to streamline and enhance the process of PICC placement. These cutting-edge devices, designed to be used in conjunction, are set to provide Vascular Access professionals with increased efficiency and predictability when inserting PICCs, ultimately reducing the risk of complications. Teleflex Incorporated, a leading global medical technology provider listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol TFX, continues its commitment to advancing healthcare solutions with the launch of these state-of-the-art products.

news.headline: BJ’s Wholesale Club offers Early Black Friday event with deals from Nov 1-17, 2024. Members save up to 20% on toys, TVs, tech, and more.
news.summary: BJ’s Wholesale Club is set to kick off the holiday season with the BJ’s Early Black Friday event, taking place from November 1 to November 17, 2024. During this period, club members can access exclusive deals on a variety of products including toys, small appliances, furniture, TVs, and tech gadgets. The discounts apply to popular brands like Barbie, Hot Wheels, Play-Doh, Bluey, and Disney, with savings of up to 20% on select toys. This limited-time event offers shoppers the opportunity to prepare for the holidays and fulfill their gift-giving needs ahead of time.

news.headline: Wolverine Worldwide to report Q3 fiscal 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, with conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET. Dial 1-800-579-2543 to join.
news.summary: Wolverine World Wide, Inc. (NYSE: WWW) has disclosed plans to release its third quarter fiscal 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, around 6:30 a.m. ET. A conference call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to analyze the results and address ongoing business trends. Interested investors and analysts can participate by calling 1-800-579-2543 (international callers dial 1-785-424).

news.headline: Wabtec's Q3 2024 GAAP EPS $1.63 (+22.6% YoY), adjusted EPS $2 (+17.6% YoY), with sales of $2.66B and cash from operations $542M.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) announced third quarter 2024 results, revealing a GAAP earnings per diluted share of $1.63, representing a 22.6% increase compared to the same period in 2023. Adjusted earnings per diluted share stood at $2.00, marking a 17.6% rise year-over-year. The company reported third quarter sales of $2.66 billion and cash from operations totaling $542 million. Wabtec's CEO, Rafael, expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting growth in sales, margins, earnings, and operating cash flow.

news.headline: Boston Scientific's Q3 2024 net sales reached $4.209 billion, growing 19.4% reported, 19.5% operational, and 18.2% organic.
news.summary: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, on October 23, 2024, Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) reported third-quarter net sales of $4.209 billion. This marks a growth of 19.4% on a reported basis, 19.5% operationally, and 18.2% organically compared to the same period last year.

news.headline: Hamilton Beach Brands Holding Company (NYSE: HBB) will release its 2024 third quarter financial results on Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: Hamilton Beach Brands Holding Company, listed on the NYSE as HBB, disclosed its plans to unveil the financial results for the third quarter of 2024 and submit its 10-Q report for the period ending September 30, 2024. The release is scheduled after the market closes on Wednesday, October 23, 2024, in Glen Allen, Virginia. This news was shared via a press release.

news.headline: Stora Enso halts divestment process of Beihai site in China announced in 2022; Decision made on October 23, 2024.
news.summary: Stora Enso Oyj has shared inside information on October 23, 2024, at 13:00 EEST in Helsinki. The company has made a significant decision to halt the divestment process for its Beihai packaging board production site and forestry business, which was initially announced in December 2022. Stora Enso's reconsideration comes after careful evaluation of the situation.

news.headline: Binance to remove IDRT, KP3R, OOKI, UNFI on Nov 6, 2024, affecting trading pairs and services. Users should adjust assets.
news.summary: Binance recently revealed its decision to remove IDRT, KP3R, OOKI, and UNFI tokens from its platform. This delisting will affect multiple trading pairs and services provided by the platform. Users are strongly recommended to take action and reorganize their assets before the set deadline to avoid any inconveniences.

news.headline: Turkcell CEO Ali Taha Koç elected to GSMA board. GSMA aims to improve global mobile operator standards since 1995.
news.summary: In Istanbul, Dr. Ali Taha Koç, CEO of Turkcell (NYSE: TKC, BIST: TCELL), has been selected to join the board of directors of the Global GSM Association (GSMA), the leading organization for the global mobile communications industry. Dr. Koç recently assumed this role within the GSMA, which was established in 1995 with the aim of enhancing international mobile operator practices. As a global entity, the GSMA brings together the mobile ecosystem to innovate and advance standards for the industry.

news.headline: Prime members get 10¢ off per gallon at select gas stations with Amazon's latest promotion.
Caristo Diagnostics wins Digital Health Award for CaRi-Heart® technology. Finalist in Fierce Healthcare Innovation Awards.
news.summary: Caristo Diagnostics, a prominent company in cardiovascular disease diagnostics and risk prediction based in Oxford, England, has been recognized as a Finalist in the Fierce Healthcare Innovation Awards. The company was also named a winner of the Digital Health Hub Foundation award. This acknowledgment comes as a testament to Caristo Diagnostics' position as a global leader in the field. The awards were announced on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Ryde reports S$4.4 million revenue in First Half 2024, down from S$5.2 million in 1H 2023, focusing on growth.
news.summary: Singapore-based Ryde Group Ltd (NYSE American: RYDE) unveiled its financial results for the first six months of 2024. The leading technology platform focused on mobility and quick commerce headquartered in Singapore disclosed a revenue of S$4.4 million (US$3.2 million) for the period, a decrease from S$5.2 million (US$3.9 million) in 1H 2023. The Company recently shifted to a 0% commission model in January.

news.headline: Crypto trader Miles Deutscher predicts Bitcoin could hit $100,000, advises focusing on 2-3 top altcoins per sector for gains.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency analyst Miles Deutscher is forecasting a significant increase in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and certain alternative coins in the near future, which could lead to profitable outcomes for investors. Deutscher recently highlighted the positive direction of Bitcoin in a YouTube video, pointing out that it has maintained levels higher than its 2021 peak for eight consecutive months. He foresees a potential climb for Bitcoin up to $100,000, supported by investments pouring into Bitcoin Spot ETFs. Deutscher also foresees increased market fluctuations, especially surrounding the U.S. election, advising investors to leverage these downturns to amass robust alternative coins. He is urging investors to seize opportunities during these slumps to gather impactful alternative coins within sectors like AI, meme coins, and real-world assets (RWA). Deutscher particularly holds high optimism towards meme coins.

news.headline: California Fish Grill uses Epson OmniLink TM-L100 for liner-free labeling, boosting efficiency in busy quick-service restaurants.
news.summary: A dependable thermal label printer that is compatible with liner-free labels is being utilized by a busy quick-service restaurant in Los Alamitos, California. The restaurant, California Fish Grill, prioritizes robust technology solutions at all its locations to enhance operational efficiency. This high-quality printer provides support to the restaurant's fast-casual setup. This news was announced on October 23, 2024, showcasing the importance of reliable technology in the restaurant industry.

news.headline: Frost & Sullivan's report on global blockchain hardware market trends up to 2024 reveals growth in modern economic systems.
news.summary: In the past few years, amidst the rapid advancement of global digital transformation, blockchain technology has emerged as a vital element of contemporary economic structures. With a significant presence in various sectors such as financial services, supply chain management, and data security, its influence continues to grow. Furthermore, the adoption of blockchain technology has notably increased, with the global market witnessing a surge in investments reaching multimillion-dollar figures.This evolution underscores the increasing recognition of blockchain's potential to revolutionize traditional practices and enhance operational efficiency across industries.

news.headline: 60% women workforce at Genus Power's manufacturing unit impresses U.S. Ambassador to India during visit with high-level U.S. delegation.
news.summary: Genus Power Infrastructures Limited in Jaipur, India, recently welcomed a notable American delegation on October 23, 2024. The U.S. Ambassador to India, Eric Garcetti, headed the delegation that also included Steve Olive, the Mission Director of USAID India, and Aaron Schubert, the Director of USAID India.

news.headline: HKMA releases results of 3-year HKD govt bond tender: bid-to-cover ratio of 3.89, annualized yield at 2.952%.
news.summary: Results from the recent 3-year HKD government bond tender were disclosed by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, showcasing a bid-to-cover ratio of 3.89 and an annualized yield of 2.952%.

news.headline: Binance ends referral program for Turkish users in compliance with local rules, ensuring service continuity. (Characters: 93)
news.summary: Binance recently revealed the cessation of its Retail Referral Program for individuals in Türkiye in order to adhere to local laws. This step was taken to avoid any interference with the continuation of its other services.

news.headline: Paralyzed Veterans of America CEO responds to DOT's record fine on American Airlines for mistreating disabled passengers.
news.summary: Paralyzed Veterans of America CEO, Carl Blake, recently commented on the Department of Transportation's significant penalty against American Airlines for their poor treatment of passengers with disabilities. The penalty, issued on October 23, 2024, marks a historic move towards ensuring the safety and dignity of all airline passengers. This action comes in response to the airline's failure to provide appropriate treatment to individuals with disabilities. The severity of the penalty underlines the importance of upholding standards in the airline industry, as it addresses a pressing issue affecting many travelers.

news.headline: Mozambique faces unrest amid talk of revolution, rich in gas reserves.
Boeing gets a notice of effectiveness for S-3 filing from the SEC.
Frontier-Kemper wins $1.1B contract for Kensico-Eastview Connection Tunnel Project.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC) revealed that its subsidiary, Frontier-Kemper Constructors, secured a contract worth around $1.1 billion from the New York City Department of Environmental Protection. The contract pertains to the Kensico-Eastview Connection Tunnel Project, which involves building a deep rock tunnel connecting the Kensico Reservoir and the Cat. The construction company is known for its expertise in civil, building, and specialty construction.

news.headline: Hand Tools and Accessories Market to hit US$ 31.4B by 2034, growing at 4.1% CAGR, with a US$ 10.4B opportunity between 2024-2034. Leading players include Stanley Black & Decker, Makita, and Klein Tools. North America to hold 36.9% market share by 2034.
news.summary: The global Hand Tools and Accessories Market is set to reach a valuation of US$21.0 billion in 2024 and is predicted to grow at a CAGR of 4.1% from 2024 to 2034, eventually reaching US$31.4 billion. The sector offers a variety of manual tools, powered hand tools, and accessories, benefitting from advancements in material science and ergonomics, resulting in improved functionality and comfort for users. Sectors like construction and automobile are driving the demand for high-quality, durable tools due to industrialization and infrastructure growth in developing countries. Innovations in technology, like smart tools, are expanding market segments. North America is expected to hold a significant market share of 36.9% by 2034. Key players in the market include Stanley Black & Decker, Snap-on Incorporated, Bosch GmbH, and others. Cutting tools are anticipated to grow by 4.6% CAGR. Overall, organizations investing in product development are likely to capitalize on market opportunities in this evolving industry.

news.headline: Revolution Medicines shares new data from RMC-6236 study for advanced Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma patients.
BostonGene to attend EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics in Barcelona on Oct 23-25, 2024. #AI #CancerResearch
news.summary: BostonGene, a top provider of AI-driven molecular and immune profiling solutions, has confirmed its participation in the 36th EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics (ENA 2024). The event is scheduled from October 23-25, 2024, at the International Barcelona Convention Center in Spain. This symposium will convene global academics, scientists, and industry experts to deliberate on advancements in drug research and development.

news.headline: Trustly to process $100B annually, leading in Pay by Bank surge with over 112M global customers.
news.summary: Trustly, a leader in Open Banking Payments, is projected to process $100 billion in Total Payments Value (TPV) by 2024. This highlights a significant change in the payments sector as merchants globally seek card alternatives. Over 112 million consumers have utilized Trustly's products, demonstrating the popularity of Pay by Bank options at checkout. Trustly, Inc., the Americas division of Trustly AB, is making strides towards this goal.

news.headline: Lookout Inc. integrates AI chatbot by Embrace.ai in Partner Hub to streamline access for partners. Boosts efficiency.
news.summary: Lookout, Inc., a cloud security company based in Boston, has unveiled the integration of a sophisticated AI chatbot from Embrace.ai within its Lookout Partner Hub portal. This move aims to enhance access to critical sales resources and improve efficiency for the Company’s partners, including alliance, technology integration, channel, and managed security service provider (MSSP) partners. The Lookout Partner Hub, developed using Impartner’s partner relationship management (PRM) solution, is designed to facilitate smoother collaboration and communication with partners. This integration is set to streamline operations and drive productivity, benefiting all stakeholders involved.

news.headline: Renaissance and Conceal team up for advanced browser security solutions in Ireland's IT sector.
news.summary: Conceal has teamed up with Renaissance to provide cutting-edge browser security solutions to the IT industry in Ireland. This partnership aims to enhance online security for businesses and organizations in the country.

The report focuses on navigating emerging trends to create optimal work environments. Cordoniq is known for its expertise in the future of work.

PSPDFKit triples revenue, rebrands as Nutrient post Insight Partners' investment, offering AI-powered solutions for digital transformation.
news.summary: Cutting-edge technology tools like AI-powered software development kits (SDKs), low-code solutions, and a workflow automation platform are revolutionizing digital transformation in today's businesses. These tools are playing a crucial role in accelerating the transition towards digitization. Recently, PSPDFKit, a top player in the document processing technology sector and workflow automation industry, made strides in this field. The latest technologies have the potential to reshape the way businesses operate and streamline processes. This development is a testament to the rapid evolution of technology and its impact on various sectors. The news was announced in Raleigh, North Carolina, on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: First Reserve sells IRISNDT testing, inspection, certification & compliance ("TICC") firm to Apave Group.
news.summary: IRISNDT is poised to capitalize on its recent progress alongside First Reserve and advance its growth objectives as a frontrunner in the Testing, Inspection, Certification & Compliance (TICC) sector. The development stems from Houston on October 23, 2024, with First Reserve, a prominent global private equity investment firm. This strategic alliance positions IRISNDT to strengthen its presence in the industry.
